description_long: This nightstand features a dark, polished wooden structure with a prominent central mirror flanked by two adjustable side mirrors, creating a classic vanity appearance. The tabletop is broad and flat, suitable for placing small personal items, and is supported by four slender, tapered legs that give the piece an elegant, elevated stance. Two drawers with round metallic knobs are integrated into the front, providing storage space for accessories or essentials. The wood finish is glossy, reflecting light and highlighting the rich, deep color of the material. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative carvings or inlays, focusing on clean lines and functional elegance. This piece would typically be found in a bedroom or dressing area, but could also appear in upscale urban interiors or boutique hotel rooms.
description: A dark, glossy wooden nightstand with a central mirror, two side mirrors, two drawers with round metallic knobs, and slender tapered legs. The design is minimalist and elegant, with a polished finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the central mirror and the two side mirrors folded outward, with the back of the tabletop and legs visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thinness of the mirrors and tabletop, as well as the slender, tapered legs.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the three-panel mirror arrangement, two drawers with round knobs, and the full tabletop surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the slim structure of the mirrors and the elegant leg design.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall, in a bedroom or dressing area
